metadata.name: Plan an Interseeding Mission for Cover Crops

description: A farmer wants to use a high-clearance robot to seed a cover crop into their standing corn crop.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the as-planted map for the corn field to get the exact location of the rows.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the row guidance lines.

nodes.task_description: Generate a path plan for the robot to drive between the corn rows.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a precise guidance path for the robot.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the interseeder robot to begin the mission.
